overall_justification: The newspaper edition primarily presents factual reporting on the imminent establishment of the Caixa de Conversão, detailing logistical preparations like staffing and funding. While it mentions potential candidates for its presidency (Quintino Bocayuva and Francisco Veiga) and alludes to the ongoing monetary debates, it refrains from explicitly endorsing either the orthodox or expansionist viewpoints. The article focuses on operational details and doesn't engage with the core arguments of either side regarding the conversion rate or the broader economic implications of the Caixa.

supporting_evidence.quote: O ministro da fazenda conta que, o mais tardar, até 12 do corrente, esteja definitivamente installada a Caixa de Conversão, cujo regulamento deve ser assignado hoje pelo presidente da República.
supporting_evidence.reason_for_inclusion: This quote highlights the factual reporting on the Caixa's establishment, focusing on the timeline and regulatory aspects.

supporting_evidence.quote: O novo instituto de credito começará a funccionar com 100.000:000$ (100.000.000$). em papel.
supporting_evidence.reason_for_inclusion: This detail about the initial funding further emphasizes the factual and operational focus of the reporting.

supporting_evidence.quote: Para o cargo de thesoureiro está assentada, conforme antecipamos, a nomeação do dr. João Gomes Rebello Horta, que, opportunamente, indicará ao ministro da fazenda os nomes dos seus fieis.
supporting_evidence.reason_for_inclusion: This quote exemplifies the newspaper's focus on personnel appointments, reinforcing the neutral and descriptive nature of the coverage.
